---
title: "BRANCH CogDRisk Complete Case Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(gtsummary)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')
source(CRS_FN)

BRANCH_cleaned_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH$BRANCH, "BRANCH_cleaned.rds"))
dat_cogd <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH$BRANCH, "BRANCH_cogd_dat.rds"))
dat_cogd_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH$BRANCH, "BRANCH_cogd_scored_dat.rds"))
dat_cogd_imp_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH$BRANCH, "BRANCH_cogd_imp_scored_dat.rds"))
```


## Calculate completeness metrics
```{r}
dat_cogd_completeness <- dat_cogd_scored %>%
  mutate(
    num_cogdrisk_vars = rowSums(!is.na(select(., -PIDN, -score_cogd))),
    complete_scores = complete.cases(select(., -PIDN, -score_cogd))
  ) %>%
  relocate(score_cogd, .after = PIDN) %>%
  relocate(complete_scores, .after = score_cogd) %>%
  relocate(num_cogdrisk_vars, .after = complete_scores)

complete_cogd <- dat_cogd_completeness %>%
  filter(complete_scores == TRUE)

cat("Total participants:", nrow(dat_cogd_completeness), "\n")
cat("Complete cases:", nrow(complete_cogd), "\n")
cat("Proportion complete:", round(nrow(complete_cogd) / nrow(dat_cogd_completeness) * 100, 1), "%\n")
```


## CogDRisk scores by number of factors used for calculation
```{r}
df <- dat_cogd_completeness %>%
  select(PIDN, score_cogd, num_cogdrisk_vars, complete_scores)

ggplot(df, aes(x = num_cogdrisk_vars)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(stat = "count",
            aes(label = after_stat(count)),
            vjust = -0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of CogDRisk Completeness",
    x = "Number of CogDRisk variables available",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


## Summary statistics by completeness
```{r}
completeness_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(num_cogdrisk_vars) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cases = n(),
    percent_cases = round((n() / nrow(df)) * 100, 1),
    min_score = round(min(score_cogd, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    mean_score = round(mean(score_cogd, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    max_score = round(max(score_cogd, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    sd_score = round(sd(score_cogd, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cogdrisk_vars))

completeness_summary
```


## Distribution of original and imputed scores
```{r}
ggplot(dat_cogd_scored, aes(x = score_cogd)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_density(aes(y = after_stat(count)), color = "darkblue", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of CogDRisk Scores (Original Data)",
    x = "CogDRisk Score",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
ggplot(dat_cogd_imp_scored, aes(x = score_cogd)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_density(aes(y = after_stat(count)), color = "darkblue", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of CogDRisk Scores (Imputed Data)",
    x = "CogDRisk Score",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(dat_cogd_scored, aes(x = score_cogd, y = 1)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "CogDRisk Score Distribution (Original)",
    x = "CogDRisk Score",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
ggplot(dat_cogd_imp_scored, aes(x = score_cogd, y = 1)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "CogDRisk Score Distribution (Imputed)",
    x = "CogDRisk Score",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
```


## Missing data patterns
```{r}
missing_pattern <- dat_cogd %>%
  select(-PIDN) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  mutate(
    Missing_Percent = round((Missing_Count / nrow(dat_cogd)) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))

ggplot(missing_pattern, aes(x = reorder(Variable, Missing_Count), y = Missing_Count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "coral") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Missing_Percent, "%")),
            hjust = -0.2, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Missing Data by Variable",
    x = "Variable",
    y = "Number of Missing Cases"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

missing_pattern
```


## Scatterplots of CogDRisk vs Biomarkers (first visit)
```{r}
# Get first biomarker measurements
janssen_first <- BRANCH_cleaned_dat$janssen %>%
  group_by(PIDN) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

quanterix_first <- BRANCH_cleaned_dat$quanterix %>%
  group_by(PIDN) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

# Combine original and imputed scores with biomarkers
cogd_bbm <- dat_cogd_scored %>%
  select(PIDN, score_original = score_cogd) %>%
  left_join(
    dat_cogd_imp_scored %>% select(PIDN, score_imputed = score_cogd),
    by = "PIDN"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    janssen_first %>% select(PIDN, gfap_janssen, nfl_janssen, ptau217_janssen),
    by = "PIDN"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    quanterix_first %>% select(PIDN, ab_ratio, gfap, nfl, ptau181),
    by = "PIDN"
  )

# p-tau217 (Janssen)
if (sum(!is.na(cogd_bbm$ptau217_janssen)) > 0) {
  p1 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_original, y = ptau217_janssen)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs p-tau217 (Janssen)",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Original)",
      y = "p-tau217 (pg/mL)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  print(p1)
  
  p2 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_imputed, y = ptau217_janssen)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs p-tau217 (Janssen)",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Imputed)",
      y = "p-tau217 (pg/mL)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  ptau217_plot <- p1 / p2
  print(ptau217_plot)
}

# p-tau181 (Quanterix)
if (sum(!is.na(cogd_bbm$ptau181)) > 0) {
  p1 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_original, y = ptau181)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs p-tau181 (Quanterix)",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Original)",
      y = "p-tau181 (pg/mL)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  p2 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_imputed, y = ptau181)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs p-tau181 (Quanterix)",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Imputed)",
      y = "p-tau181 (pg/mL)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  ptau181_plot <- p1 / p2
  print(ptau181_plot)
}

# GFAP (Janssen)
if (sum(!is.na(cogd_bbm$gfap_janssen)) > 0) {
  p1 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_original, y = gfap_janssen)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs GFAP (Janssen)",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Original)",
      y = "GFAP (pg/mL)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  p2 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_imputed, y = gfap_janssen)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs GFAP (Janssen)",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Imputed)",
      y = "GFAP (pg/mL)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  gfap_plot <- p1 / p2
  print(gfap_plot)
}

# Aβ42/40 ratio (Quanterix)
if (sum(!is.na(cogd_bbm$ab_ratio)) > 0) {
  p1 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_original, y = ab_ratio)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs Aβ42/40 ratio",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Original)",
      y = "Aβ42/40 ratio"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  p2 <- ggplot(cogd_bbm, aes(x = score_imputed, y = ab_ratio)) +
    geom_point(shape = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
    stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
    labs(
      title = "CogDRisk vs Aβ42/40 ratio",
      x = "CogDRisk Score (Imputed)",
      y = "Aβ42/40 ratio"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  abratio_plot <- p1 / p2
  print(abratio_plot)
}
```


## Summary table of complete cases
```{r}
complete_cogd %>%
  select(score_cogd, Age, Sex, Education_level, apoe) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    label = list(
      score_cogd = "CogDRisk Score",
      Age = "Age",
      Sex = "Sex",
      Education_level = "Education Level",
      apoe = "APOE Status"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_caption("**Characteristics of Complete CogDRisk Cases (n = {N})**") %>%
  bold_labels()
```


## Comparing original scores vs imputed scores
```{r}
# Combine complete and imputed scores
df_comparison <- dat_cogd_scored %>%
  select(PIDN, original_score = score_cogd) %>%
  left_join(
    dat_cogd_imp_scored %>% select(PIDN, imputed_score = score_cogd),
    by = "PIDN"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(original_score, imputed_score),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "score_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                        "original_score" = "Original",
                        "imputed_score" = "Imputed Data"))

# Calculate SD ratio and perform Wilcoxon test
original_scores <- dat_cogd_scored$score_cogd
imputed_scores <- dat_cogd_imp_scored$score_cogd 

sd_ratio <- sd(imputed_scores, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(original_scores, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox_result <- wilcox.test(original_scores, imputed_scores)

ggplot(df_comparison, aes(x = method, y = score_value, fill = method)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label.x = 1.5) +
  labs(
    title = "CogDRisk Scores: Original vs Imputed Data",
    subtitle = paste0("SD ratio (Imputed/Original) = ", round(sd_ratio, 3)),
    x = "Method",
    y = "CogDRisk Score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

cat("\nWilcoxon test p-value:", wilcox_result$p.value, "\n")
cat("Mean score (complete):", round(mean(original_scores, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
cat("Mean score (original):", round(mean(imputed_scores, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
```
